notes: v0.16.53 — first-time onboarding now FORCES a real callsign. The text field starts EMPTY (no "Pulsewave Tester" pre-fill anywhere). CONFIRM stays visually disabled until input is 3–16 chars (letters / numbers / underscore). Steam users get an explicit USE STEAM NICKNAME button — no silent auto-fill. Old saves still carrying the placeholder are re-routed through the wizard. Settings nickname row no longer falls back to a placeholder when cleared (reverts to your locked-in name instead). Windows only.
